PORT.description: Port the n8n service listens on inside the container

N8N_PORT.description: Port n8n listens on (must match Railway PORT). Defaults to 5678.

DB_TYPE.description: Database engine: postgresdb for PostgreSQL, sqlite for local dev

N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE.description: Allow Code nodes to access process.env (v2 defaults to true, set false for v1 compatibility)

N8N_SECURE_COOKIE.description: Controls the Secure flag on n8n's session cookie — true (default) sends cookie only over HTTPS

N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: Encryption key for workflow credentials. Set once and never change.

N8N_BASIC_AUTH_USER.description: Basic auth username (required if basic auth is active)

N8N_BASIC_AUTH_ACTIVE.description: Enable HTTP basic auth on the n8n editor UI

DB_POSTGRESDB_DATABASE.description: PostgreSQL database name for n8n data

N8N_BASIC_AUTH_PASSWORD.description: Basic auth password for the n8n editor UI (only needed if basic auth is enabled)
